---
title: " Shakespeare’s Plays for Schools.  Prepared and annotated for school use by Charlotte M. Yonge. 5 vols"
---

##  Shakespeare’s Plays for Schools.  Prepared and annotated for school use by Charlotte M. Yonge. 5 vols

**By Charlotte Mary Yonge**

**Published:** 1883-5
**Genre:** Non-fiction: edited drama
**Format:** Book, 5 vols

**Publisher:** London: National Society’s Depository, Broad Sanctuary, Westminster.

### Notes

Contains <i>Henry IV</i> parts I and II, <i>Henry V, Richard II </i>and <i>Julius Caesar.</i>

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
